title: Eclipse: New Era
description: Embark on the difficulty of the Eclipse! New items, blocks and, most importantly, new armor! Become literally untouchable with the Eclipse Armor!
body:
![Eclipse Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f41da45ca6654fec6f46da0541af2932a9022d5.png)

**_Eclipse ALPHA!!!_**

Requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) & [TerraBlender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender)!!!


Eclipse is a mod that adds new items, blocks, and most importantly, new armor such as **Ruby Armor**, **Sapphire Armor**, **Garnet Armor**, **Bedrock Armor**, **Prismatic Obsidian Armor**, and others. But there's also the **Eclipse Armor** that makes you literally untouchable!
The Eclipse mod is a mod that will drive you crazy with so many things to do. But in the end it will all be worth the effort!
If you like mods that are difficult and complicated to complete, Eclipse is the one for you!



## All Glory to Jesus!!!
